titleStmt.title: SII 38.472: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 472. (A.R. No. 472 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the north wall, maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine, Marundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakkravartti Rājarāja III Year 16+1: 1233 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records the approval of the members of the Annual executive committee (samatsaram grāma-kāriyam) of the village Kulōttuṅgachōḻachaturvēdimaṅgalam in the Puṟaṅgarambai-nāḍu (a sub-division of) Rājēndrachōḻavaḷanāḍu. The approval was for the assignment of half-a-kāṇi of tax-free land (after maḍakku adjustment) to the god Tiruttuṟai-nāyaṉār, for providing food offerings during the midnight service (tiruvattasāmam) (called) the Mūvāyiravaṉ-sandhi to the above god. It is also stated that all the expenses of the sabhā (sabhāviṉiyōgam) were to be met out of the income of the land assigned. Further it is recorded that this arrangement was endorsed by two officials, Sāttanūr-uḍaiyāṉ Mahājanapiriyan, a village accountant and Kurukkatti-uḍaiyāṉ Mahājanapiriyan, a land revenue official (nilakkaṇakku). It is also mentioned that the land has been donated out of the lands owned by the temple (tirunāmattūkkāṇi) and has been declared freed from taxes from the 17th regnal year of the king (1233 A.D.).
Members of the executive committee such as Mahājanappiriyan, the village accountant, Kuravaśēri Tiruvaraṅga Bhaṭṭaṉ, Irāyūr Soṭṭai Vishṇu Bhaṭṭaṉ and many others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ ... tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirājai
rājatevarkku yāṇṭu 16ntiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu
irājentiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkaram
paināṭṭu kulottu[ṅ*ka]coḻaccaruppe
timaṅkalam kumpanāyaṟu mutal sammatsara
ṅ kirāmakāriyam ceykiṟa kūṭṭaperumakkaḷ
eḻuttu . Ūr(ka)kkaṇakku cāttaṉūruṭaiyāṉ makā
janapiriyaṉum nilakkaṇakku kurukkatti Uṭaiyāṉ
makājanapiriyaṉum kaṇṭu Uṭaiyār tiruttuṟainā
yiṉārkku tiruvottacāmattukku muvāyiravaṉcanti
Amutuceytaruḷa Amutupaṭikkum viñcaṉattukkum nam
murp piṭākai vaṅkainakarakallum marutaṉatti
lum tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa nilattāl maṭakkil
le Araikkāṇi maṭakku patiṉnāṟāvatiṉ Etirām Ā
ṇṭu pacāṉam mutal cantirātittavaraiyi(ṭa)ṟaiyili yā
ka viṭṭu Imaṭakku nilam Araikkāṇikkum talaimā
ṟukaṇThe letter ‘ṇ’ is engraved above this line.ṭeṟu taramiliyāka sahāviṉiyokattukku Uṭa(l)
lāṉa maṭakkille vaittukoḷḷaThe letter ‘ḷa’ is engraved above this line.vum Ippaṭi tiruma
ṇṭapattey kalluveṭṭikkoḷḷakaṭavatā
kavum Iṟaiyilivā viṉiyokaṅkaḷum Imaṭak
(k)kukku kaḻikkakaṭavatākavum coṉṉom Ippaṭi
ceyappaṇṇukaveṉṟu paṇiyāl Ivai Ūr
kaṇakku makāceṉappiriyaṉṉeḻuttu Ivai kura
vaceri tiruvaraṅkapaṭṭaṉṉeḻuttu teṉṟum
Ivai Irāyūrcoṭṭai Iyvi
ṣṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuṇṭur tiruvaraṅka
paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cirāci �
viṣṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ālikoṉṟai
Iḷaiyacirāmapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai Irāyūrcoṭṭai peruṅkā
ḷa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
tirukūṭamukkil [śrī]karuṣṇapaṭ
ṭaṉRead as śrīkiruṣṇapaṭṭaṉEḻuttu Ivai kokkaraitiruva
raṅkapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Oppa
ṟai jaṉayapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kāṭ
ṭukuṟi Iḷaiya tiruveṇkāṭupaṭṭa
ṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Oppuṟai naṭuvil
tiruveṅkaṭapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
va Ātaṉṉūr civācutevapaṭṭaṉ
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kārāmpic
ceṭṭu tūppil cirāmapaṭṭaṉ Eḻut
tu Ivai Oppuṟai Uruttirapaṭṭaṉ Eḻu
ttu Ivai ĀlikoṉṟaiThe letter ‘ṟa’ is engraved above this line.cirāma pa
ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ĀlikoṉṟaiThe letter ‘ṟa’ is engraved above this line.I
ḷaiyacaṅkaraThere is a small stroke over the letter ‘ra’ is (like ri ). This may be iṅnored.nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai Irāyūrcoṭṭai perupavaṉa paṭṭaṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai kārampiceṭṭu tūppil (na)
nāraāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku I
vai komaṭattu muttacirāma paṭṭaṉ Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruveṇkāṭu paṭ
ṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Oppuṟai Āṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāyūr(ra) coṭṭai tiruva
raṅka paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Ālikkoṉṟai
tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
Ivai kuṇṭur Iḷaiyanārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai muppirāl Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷa paṭṭaṉ E
ḻuttu ... � ....
Digital edition of SII 38.472 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
